label: Equippable ability reloadable comp
description: Extends the equippable ability comp to add charge-based ammo reloading for the granted ability.

maxCharges.label: Max charges
maxCharges.description: Maximum number of charges the weapon can hold.

ammoDef.label: Ammo def
ammoDef.description: ThingDef used as ammo to reload this weapon's ability charges.

ammoCountToRefill.label: Ammo count to refill
ammoCountToRefill.description: Amount of ammo consumed to completely refill all charges. Mutually exclusive with ammoCountPerCharge.

ammoCountPerCharge.label: Ammo count per charge
ammoCountPerCharge.description: Amount of ammo consumed per charge refilled. Mutually exclusive with ammoCountToRefill.

baseReloadTicks.label: Base reload ticks
baseReloadTicks.description: Ticks required to complete one reload cycle.

replenishAfterCooldown.label: Replenish after cooldown
replenishAfterCooldown.description: If true, charges refill automatically after the ability cooldown ends instead of requiring manual reloading.

soundReload.label: Sound reload
soundReload.description: SoundDef played when this weapon is reloaded.

chargeNoun.label: Charge noun
chargeNoun.description: Localized noun for a single charge shown in the gizmo UI (e.g., "charge", "arrow").

cooldownGerund.label: Cooldown gerund
cooldownGerund.description: Localized gerund phrase shown during the ability cooldown (e.g., "on cooldown").
